steps.title: Use the title note
steps.content: The student wants the title of Hurston's first published short story. The notes directly state that the story was called "John Redding Goes to Sea."

steps.title: Reject incomplete details
steps.content: Choice A gives only the year. Choice C gives the year and publication venue but not the title. Choice D says the work was a short story but does not name it. The answer is B.
